description:
Perform a Random Forest Regression on the 'Exam Anxiety' dataset to predict 'Exam' scores using 'Anxiety' and 'Revise' as predictors. Configure the model with 100 trees and 80% training data, ensuring the analysis includes a predictive performance plot and variable importance. Save the JASP project to /home/ga/Documents/JASP/rf_exam_analysis.jasp. Create a text report at /home/ga/Documents/JASP/rf_report.txt containing the Test Set MSE, Test Set R2, and the name of the most important predictor using the following format:
Line 1: MSE: <value>
Line 2: R2: <value>
Line 3: Most Important Predictor: <variable name>
